prompt: Create a vertical dark retro fashion magazine portrait of an adult East Asian woman with long straight black hair, wispy bangs, a few loose strands on her cheeks, delicate facial features, realistic skin texture, calm lazy slightly detached eyes. She is seated in a dim studio against a mottled charcoal-gray textured backdrop, framed from upper thighs to head, slightly right of center. Style the scene as a moody editorial beauty shoot with cinematic low-key lighting, soft shadows, muted colors, subtle film grain, and a gothic romantic atmosphere. She wears an oversized black blazer slipped off one shoulder over a black lace camisole with thin straps and a short black skirt; show collarbones and one bare shoulder tastefully. Her pose is quiet and composed: one hand holds a deep red lipstick near her parted lips, her gaze looks off to the side rather than into camera, expression neutral and serene. Include exactly 2 assistant hands entering the frame: one hand from the right applying blush to her cheek with a makeup brush, and one hand from the lower left holding an open round compact mirror or powder case in dark red. Add refined magazine typography overlays: large distressed serif title text GLITCH at upper left, widely spaced subtitle ROMANCE below it, a small barcode above the title, tiny text at upper right reading digital dissonance in a analog world ///, tiny text at lower left reading "when beauty breaks the algorithm", and lower right caption reading // MORE THAN A PRETTY FACE with a faint glitch underline. Keep all typography subtle, ivory-gray, and integrated into the poster design. Photorealistic, high fashion, shallow depth of field, natural makeup, glossy red lips, no smile, no extra people or faces, no bright colors, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical dark retro fashion magazine portrait of an adult East Asian woman with long straight black hair, wispy bangs, a few loose strands on her cheeks, delicate facial features, realistic skin texture, calm lazy slightly detached eyes. She is seated in a dim studio against a mottled charcoal-gray textured backdrop, framed from upper thighs to head, slightly right of center. Style the scene as a moody editorial beauty shoot with cinematic low-key lighting, soft shadows, muted colors, subtle film grain, and a gothic romantic atmosphere. She wears an oversized black blazer slipped off one shoulder over a black lace camisole with thin straps and a short black skirt; show collarbones and one bare shoulder tastefully. Her pose is quiet and composed: one hand holds a deep red lipstick near her parted lips, her gaze looks off to the side rather than into camera, expression neutral and serene. Add refined magazine typography overlays: large distressed serif title text GLITCH at upper left, widely spaced subtitle ROMANCE below it, a small barcode above the title, tiny text at upper right reading digital dissonance in a analog world ///, tiny text at lower left reading "when beauty breaks the algorithm", and lower right caption reading // MORE THAN A PRETTY FACE with a faint glitch underline. Keep all typography subtle, ivory-gray, and integrated into the poster design. Photorealistic, high fashion, shallow depth of field, natural makeup, glossy red lips, no smile, no extra people or faces, no bright colors, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张竖版暗黑复古时尚杂志肖像，主角为 一位成年东亚女性，留着黑色长直发，带有空气刘海，几缕发丝垂在脸颊旁，五官精致，皮肤纹理真实，眼神平静慵懒且略带疏离感。她坐在昏暗的摄影棚内，背景为斑驳的炭灰色纹理墙面，构图为从大腿上部到头部的半身像，位置略微偏右。场景风格为情绪化编辑美学拍摄，采用电影级低调照明、柔和阴影、低饱和度色彩、细腻的胶片颗粒感，营造出哥特式浪漫氛围。她身穿一件从单肩滑落的黑色廓形西装外套，内搭黑色蕾丝吊带背心和黑色短裙；优雅地露出锁骨和一侧肩膀。她的姿态安静从容：一只手拿着深红色口红靠近微启的双唇，目光看向侧方而非直视镜头，表情中性且宁静。画面中需包含 2 只助手的手：一只手从右侧伸入，用化妆刷为她涂抹腮红；另一只手从左下方伸入，拿着一个深红色的圆形粉饼盒或化妆镜。添加精致的杂志排版叠加效果：左上角为大号做旧衬线字体标题 GLITCH，下方为宽间距副标题 ROMANCE，标题上方有一个小条形码，右上角为微型文字 digital dissonance in a analog world ///，左下角为微型文字 "when beauty breaks the algorithm"，右下角为说明文字 // MORE THAN A PRETTY FACE，并带有淡淡的故障风下划线。所有排版需保持低调，呈象牙灰色，并融入海报设计中。照片级真实感，高级时尚，浅景深，自然妆容，亮面红唇，无笑容，无额外人物或面孔，无明亮色彩，无水印。
